description: This file implements a color mode toggler for Bootstrap's documentation site, allowing users to switch between light, dark, and auto themes, with preferences stored in localStorage and responsive to system theme changes.

methods.name: getStoredTheme
methods.description: Retrieves the stored theme preference from localStorage.

methods.name: setStoredTheme
methods.description: Stores the selected theme preference into localStorage.

methods.name: getPreferredTheme
methods.description: Determines the preferred theme based on stored preference or system settings.

methods.name: setTheme
methods.description: Applies the specified theme to the document, considering 'auto' mode.

methods.name: showActiveTheme
methods.description: Updates UI elements to reflect the currently active theme, optionally focusing the theme switcher.
